title: 第五幕　お気に召すまま

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we meet Fuji Kiseki's mother, we learn that,
despite being a famous actor, she struggles with
stage fright to this day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki learns something important from her
mother's words. She realizes that what she needs
to stand on the turf is the will to keep taking on
challenges even if she fails.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gains a new sense of determination. I know in
my heart she can overcome anything she sets her
mind to.
